alkylation reagent: the static modification of cysteine (57 Da, alkylation with cloroacetamide)
cleavage agent: Enzyme specificity was set to 'Trypsin' with two missed cleavages allowed.
collision energy: Fragmentation was achieved by stepped Higher Energy Collision Dissociation (sHCD) (NCE 25, 30, 35).
enrichment method: purified the complex by affinity chromatography and size-exclusion chromatography
fractionation method: purified the complex by affinity chromatography and size-exclusion chromatography
fragmentation method: Fragmentation was achieved by stepped Higher Energy Collision Dissociation (sHCD)
instrument: Experiments were performed on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Thermo)
ionization type: attached to a nanospray flex ion source (Thermo)
